Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ServiceAISetupField

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ServiceAISetupField
public class ServiceAISetupField extends Metadata

Java class for ServiceAISetupField complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ServiceAISetupField">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="entity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="field" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="fieldMappingType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ServiceAISetupFieldType"/>
         <element name="fieldPosition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="setupDefinition" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
